headline: Amazon updated 2023’s Fire HD 10 tablet with 4GB of RAM
summary: Amazon's 2023 Fire HD 10 tablet received a quiet update. The 32GB version now ships with 4GB of RAM. This is an increase from the original 3GB of RAM.

headline: World Cup spectators under potential federal surveillance
summary: The U.S. is co-hosting the World Cup and celebrating America250. Spectators and host city residents may be under surveillance. Federal authorities could be using drones and cameras to monitor events.

headline: Godox C100: A slim camera with a transparent LCD viewfinder
summary: Standalone point-and-shoot cameras are experiencing a renaissance. Godox, known for lighting, has entered the simple camera market. The new C100 features a unique transparent LCD screen as its viewfinder.

headline: The Verge finally receives Trump Mobile's T1 Phone
summary: A Verge writer finally received the Trump Mobile T1 Phone 8002. This delivery comes over a year after the phone was first announced. The article shares first impressions of the device.

headline: DiCaprio and Bale reportedly cast in Heat 2
summary: Leonardo DiCaprio and Christian Bale are reportedly cast in Heat 2. DiCaprio is set to play Chris Shiherlis, and Bale will portray Vincent Hanna. Filming for the highly anticipated sequel is planned for November 2026.

headline: Top Deals: Nintendo eShop, Bose Headphones, DJI Camera
summary: Discover today's best tech deals, including 4th of July weekend savings. Get a $150 Nintendo eShop Gift Card. Find discounts on Bose QuietComfort Headphones and the DJI Osmo Pocket 3 Camera.

headline: Marvel Rivals' controversial Captain America swimsuit skin
summary: NetEase Games released a new Captain America swimsuit skin for Marvel Rivals. Fans initially mistook a part of the costume for a mod due to its suggestive nature. The skin has generated discussion and humor among the community.

headline: Concerns over missing half of The Odyssey without Imax
summary: People are worried they'll only experience half of 'The Odyssey' if they don't see it in IMAX. The article addresses these concerns regarding the film's presentation. It questions whether IMAX is truly essential for a complete viewing.

headline: Starmer warns Burnham on global affairs post-premiership
summary: Outgoing PM, in a candid BBC interview, admitted it was 'really tough' to accept his political career was over. Starmer warned Burnham that he will need to dedicate time to global affairs. This is Burnham's first interview since quitting as PM.

headline: England v Mexico World Cup match time change
summary: England's World Cup last-16 tie against Mexico is set for Sunday. The kick-off time is expected to move to 19:00 BST. This adjustment will affect fans planning to watch the crucial match.

headline: Three acquitted of Lyra McKee's murder
summary: Three men were found not guilty in connection with journalist Lyra McKee's murder. McKee, 29, was shot during rioting in Londonderry in April 2019. The verdict concludes a high-profile murder trial.

headline: Nowak killer appeals conviction and sentence
summary: Vickrum Digwa, convicted of fatally stabbing student Nowak, is appealing his conviction. He is currently serving a minimum sentence of 21 years behind bars. The appeal challenges both the guilty verdict and the imposed sentence.
